title: Eurystyles cogniauxii

Eurystyles cogniauxii is further classified within the subfamily Epidendroideae, which includes orchids commonly known as the " Epidendrum orchids". intro: Eurystyles cogniauxii, also known as the Eurystyles orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the Eurystyles orchid has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its purported health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Eurystyles cogniauxii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
